Third personing is a practice where people having interpersonal problems will talk about them in the third person to break their frame and solve the problem<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bPHqY4WiwwU</ref><ref>[[Awakening from the Meaning crisis]] episode 12 9:19</ref>

Also called Solomon effect

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Third Personing]][[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Inner Dialogue]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Third Personing]][[Category:Higher States of Consciousness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
